pull_request.title: feat(decoder): tune beam search params + bump eval baseline
pull_request.body:
Tunes beam_width from 5 to 8 on the CTC decoder. WER on the clean-speech dev set drops from 8.2% to 7.9%.

Also bumps the eval baseline WER target in `evals/config/baseline.yaml` from 8.2 to 7.9 to match the new expected ceiling. README benchmark table updated to reflect the improvement.

Tested manually against 50 samples from LibriSpeech test-clean. Full eval suite needed to confirm no regressions on noisy-speech or accented-speech sets.

repository.name: voice-engine
repository.description: Real-time speech generation with STT/TTS eval pipeline
